summary: Room Management Access Control Testing Complete. All 8 backend tests passed (100%). RoomsTab.js is now view-only with no add/edit dialogs or buttons. Settings.js has 'Oda Yönetimi' tab visible only for super_admin users. Backend endpoints (POST /api/pms/rooms, /rooms/bulk/range, /rooms/bulk/template, /rooms/bulk/delete) protected with require_super_admin_guard. Frontend browser testing limited by session persistence issue in Playwright context.
critical_code_review_comments: RoomsTab.js (PMS): Correctly simplified to view-only with no onClick handlers on room cards, no add/edit buttons, no Dialog imports - VERIFIED
Settings.js: 'Oda Yönetimi' tab properly guarded with isSuperAdmin check (lines 392, 862) - VERIFIED
Settings.js: Room CRUD (create, bulk add, delete) properly calls backend with full API URLs - VERIFIED
pms.py: All 4 room management endpoints use require_super_admin_guard (lines 83, 297, 354, 422) - VERIFIED
require_super_admin_guard in helpers.py returns 403 for non-super_admin users - VERIFIED
Demo user (demo@hotel.com) confirmed as super_admin role via login test

success_rate.frontend: Code review verified - browser testing limited by Playwright session persistence

seed_data_creation: Test rooms created with prefix TEST_, BULK*, DELTEST_ during backend testing (auto-deleted via bulk delete)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Room management access control verified. RoomsTab in PMS is view-only. Settings > Oda Yönetimi tab only shows for super_admin. All room CRUD endpoints require super_admin role. Test file at /app/backend/tests/test_room_management_access.py can be used for regression testing. Demo user is super_admin.

pms_rooms_tab.no_add_room_button: VERIFIED - code review shows no button
pms_rooms_tab.no_bulk_add_button: VERIFIED - code review shows no button
pms_rooms_tab.no_onclick_on_room_cards: VERIFIED - Card component has no onClick handler
pms_rooms_tab.no_dialog_opens_on_click: VERIFIED - no Dialog component imported or rendered
